structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply systematic counting methods and probability principles to determine arrangements and selections in mathematical contexts.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate arrangements and selections using counting principles and combinations.

level_statements.y6: I can count simple arrangements using basic multiplication principles.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate permutations and combinations for basic selection problems.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate arrangements and selections using counting principles and combinations.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize and work with logical constructs that form the foundation of mathematical reasoning and proof.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify logical structures in mathematical statements and conditions.

level_statements.y6: I can identify simple mathematical patterns and basic logical connections.
level_statements.y7: I can recognize if-then statements and simple logical structures in mathematics.
level_statements.y8: I can identify logical structures in mathematical statements and conditions.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to perform computational procedures with fractional numbers using established mathematical algorithms.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can perform arithmetic operations with fractions using standard algorithms.

level_statements.y6: I can add and subtract fractions with like denominators using procedures.
level_statements.y7: I can multiply and divide simple fractions using standard algorithms.
level_statements.y8: I can perform arithmetic operations with fractions using standard algorithms.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to categorize decimal representations according to their mathematical properties and characteristics.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can classify decimal numbers as finite, infinite, or periodic.

level_statements.y6: I can identify basic decimal types like finite and simple repeating decimals.
level_statements.y7: I can distinguish between finite and infinite decimal representations.
level_statements.y8: I can classify decimal numbers as finite, infinite, or periodic.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply systematic procedures for approximating numerical values to specified levels of precision.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply rounding rules to whole numbers and decimals.

level_statements.y6: I can round whole numbers to the nearest ten or hundred.
level_statements.y7: I can round decimals to one decimal place using rounding rules.
level_statements.y8: I can apply rounding rules to whole numbers and decimals.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to transform numerical representations between different mathematical systems using conversion procedures.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can convert between different number systems using correct procedures.

level_statements.y6: I can convert between simple fractions and decimals using basic procedures.
level_statements.y7: I can convert between fractions, decimals and percentages using standard methods.
level_statements.y8: I can convert between different number systems using correct procedures.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to decompose numbers into prime components and apply divisibility concepts to find common factors and multiples.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify prime factors and find greatest common divisors.

level_statements.y6: I can find factors of numbers using simple division methods.
level_statements.y7: I can identify prime factors and apply basic divisibility rules.
level_statements.y8: I can identify prime factors and find greatest common divisors.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to isolate variables in algebraic equations using systematic solution procedures.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can solve one-step linear equations using inverse operations.

level_statements.y6: I can solve simple addition and subtraction equations using inverse operations.
level_statements.y7: I can solve basic multiplication and division equations using inverse operations.
level_statements.y8: I can solve one-step linear equations using inverse operations.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute proportional relationships and percentage changes using established mathematical formulas.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply percentage formulas to calculate increases and decreases.

level_statements.y6: I can calculate simple percentages using basic multiplication methods.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate percentage increases and decreases using formulas.
level_statements.y8: I can apply percentage formulas to calculate increases and decreases.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to identify and describe the mathematical properties of relations and mappings between sets.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify domain, range, and function types accurately.

level_statements.y6: I can identify simple input-output relationships in basic patterns.
level_statements.y7: I can identify domain and range in simple function relationships.
level_statements.y8: I can identify domain, range, and function types accurately.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to locate and represent points within coordinate systems using mathematical notation conventions.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify and plot points using coordinate notation.

level_statements.y6: I can plot simple points on a coordinate grid using whole numbers.
level_statements.y7: I can identify and plot points using positive coordinate notation.
level_statements.y8: I can identify and plot points using coordinate notation.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute measures of central tendency from numerical data using statistical procedures.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate mean, median, and mode from data sets.

level_statements.y6: I can find the mode and median from simple data sets.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate mean and median from organized data sets.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate mean, median, and mode from data sets.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize geometric figures with identical shape and size using established mathematical criteria.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify congruent triangles using standard criteria.

level_statements.y6: I can identify triangles that look identical in shape and size.
level_statements.y7: I can recognize congruent triangles using basic comparison methods.
level_statements.y8: I can identify congruent triangles using standard criteria.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute linear and spatial measurements of polygonal shapes using geometric formulas.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply area and perimeter formulas to calculate polygon measurements.

level_statements.y6: I can calculate perimeter and area of simple rectangles and squares.
level_statements.y7: I can apply area and perimeter formulas to basic polygon shapes.
level_statements.y8: I can apply area and perimeter formulas to calculate polygon measurements.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute angular and linear properties of many-sided figures using geometric relationships.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply polygon angle and diagonal formulas accurately.

level_statements.y6: I can identify angles in simple polygons like triangles and squares.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate interior angles of basic polygons using formulas.
level_statements.y8: I can apply polygon angle and diagonal formulas accurately.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to compute three-dimensional measurements of rectangular solids using volumetric and surface formulas.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate surface area and volume of prisms accurately.

level_statements.y6: I can find volume of simple rectangular prisms using length times width.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate volume and basic surface area of rectangular prisms.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate surface area and volume of prisms accurately.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to create and analyze mathematical relationships through coordinate graphing and data interpretation.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can construct coordinate graphs and interpret mathematical relationships.

level_statements.y6: I can plot simple points and create basic coordinate graphs.
level_statements.y7: I can construct coordinate graphs and identify basic mathematical patterns.
level_statements.y8: I can construct coordinate graphs and interpret mathematical relationships.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply mathematical laws and rules to transform and simplify algebraic expressions systematically.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply exponent laws and identities to simplify expressions.

level_statements.y6: I can use basic multiplication to write repeated factors as exponents.
level_statements.y7: I can apply simple exponent rules like multiplying powers with same base.
level_statements.y8: I can apply exponent laws and identities to simplify expressions.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to apply mathematical laws and rules to transform and simplify algebraic expressions systematically.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply algebraic rules to manipulate expressions into forms.

level_statements.y6: I can combine like terms and apply distributive property with numbers.
level_statements.y7: I can use algebraic rules to simplify expressions with one variable.
level_statements.y8: I can apply algebraic rules to manipulate expressions into equivalent forms.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to analyze statistical relationships and probability patterns within mathematical data collections and interpret their connections.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify the mathematical relationship between frequency and probability in data sets.

level_statements.y6: I can count outcomes and describe how often events happen in simple data.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate frequency and connect it to likelihood of events in data collections.
level_statements.y8: I can identify the mathematical relationship between frequency and probability in data sets.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to recognize and categorize geometric figures based on their defining characteristics and structural properties.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can classify triangles and quadrilaterals according to their geometric properties.

level_statements.y6: I can sort triangles and squares by counting sides and corners.
level_statements.y7: I can group triangles by side lengths and quadrilaterals by parallel sides.
level_statements.y8: I can classify triangles and quadrilaterals according to their geometric properties.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The capacity to recognize and distinguish between different types of geometric movements and their mathematical descriptions.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify types of geometric transformations from their visual representations.

level_statements.y6: I can spot when shapes are flipped, turned, or moved.
level_statements.y7: I can name reflections, rotations, and translations from shape movements.
level_statements.y8: I can identify types of geometric transformations from their visual representations.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The skill to understand and identify the fundamental characteristics that define reflection operations in geometry.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify reflection properties including symmetry lines and angle preservation.

level_statements.y6: I can find lines of symmetry in simple shapes.
level_statements.y7: I can identify mirror lines and equal distances in reflections.
level_statements.y8: I can identify reflection properties including symmetry lines and angle preservation.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The knowledge of distinctive attributes that characterize specific categories of four-sided geometric figures.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify defining properties of parallelograms, trapezoids, and kites.

level_statements.y6: I can recognize rectangles, squares, and basic four-sided shapes.
level_statements.y7: I can identify parallel sides in quadrilaterals and basic properties.
level_statements.y8: I can identify defining properties of parallelograms, trapezoids, and kites.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The understanding of how triangle sides and angles relate to each other and the properties of important triangle segments.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can identify triangle side-angle relationships and properties of special lines.

level_statements.y6: I can compare triangle side lengths and identify right angles.
level_statements.y7: I can relate longer sides to larger angles in triangles.
level_statements.y8: I can identify triangle side-angle relationships and properties of special lines.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The practical skill to perform geometric movements on shapes with precision and mathematical correctness.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can apply reflections, rotations, and translations to shapes accurately.

level_statements.y6: I can flip and slide simple shapes on grid paper.
level_statements.y7: I can perform basic transformations using coordinate grids and instructions.
level_statements.y8: I can apply reflections, rotations, and translations to shapes accurately.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The computational ability to determine area and volume measurements using established geometric formulas.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can calculate areas and volumes using correct formulas for shapes.

level_statements.y6: I can find areas of rectangles and count unit cubes for volume.
level_statements.y7: I can calculate areas of triangles and parallelograms using basic formulas.
level_statements.y8: I can calculate areas and volumes using correct formulas for shapes.

structured_lts.competency_definition: The ability to translate real-world situations into mathematical equations and solve complex word problems systematically.
structured_lts.lt_definition: I can construct equations that accurately represent mathematical relationships in word problems.

level_statements.y6: I can write simple equations using one variable from basic word problems.
level_statements.y7: I can create equations with multiple operations from multi-step word problem scenarios.
level_statements.y8: I can construct equations that accurately represent mathematical relationships in word problems.
